text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning, while taking a stroll through town...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Big Bro! Come here, I want you to hear this
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Big Sis! Come here, I want you to hear this
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... So, I actually wanna go abroad...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I saw her looking at travel brochures quite
intensely. As a first-rate Umamusume, it's my duty
to reach out to younger students who have a lot
on their minds.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Not only that... I certainly understand the desire
to run internationally.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure that if you apply, the academy will
even prepare a hotel for you. You could even
demand a first-rate hotel. Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You sure know your stuff, King! I guess
first-rate Umamusume know everything!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'd really love to sit down with you and pick your
brain. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! You're a bright one! I am a first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'll cancel my plans and give you two a
special lecture! Let's go somewhere we can talk!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'm a first-rate student, after all! It's
natural for me to treat the younger generation to
a tasty meal now and then. ♪
choice_data_list: I think that's my job, actually...
I think that's my job, actually...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come now. Don't you worry either. This is my gift
to an adorable junior. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! We'd like to order, please!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll have a creamy chocolate latte! ♪

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Coming right up.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, is there anywhere specific you'd like to go? If
there is, I can put you in touch with someone...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... I'm thinking maybe somewhere in Asia.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, not a bad choice. Most everywhere is close,
so you don't have to worry about jet lag. A
reasonable choice for your first trip abroad.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking about going to Hong Kong
myself. Not right now, but sometime.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a coincidence! I was just thinking
about how much I wanted to go there!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Last time, I went 'cause I was invited, so I thought
it'd be nice to plan a trip myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? So you've been there before?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Fans there were buzzing about how they
wanted to meet me, so I put on a small meet and
greet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, the fans actually did all the preparation for
me... Oh, I almost forgot! I have a pic.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Are they all your fans?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The picture shows Curren Chan together with
hundreds of fans.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
W-wow... It's amazing that you can hold events
like that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But I think I'd like to go on an official tour
this time...
choice_data_list: You really know how to put things into motion...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But I think I'd like to go on an official tour
this time...
choice_data_list: You really know how to put things into motion...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I wouldn't call it power so much as being
very active in my community!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if I'm powerful, that makes King even
more powerful! She had an amazing race recently!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, King? Next time, will you teach me your
training methods too? ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: S-sure...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Here's your creamy chocolate latte. I'll set it down
right here.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! It looks so good! Thank you, King! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the tremendous bombshell force from
the news of the Hong Kong meet and greet is so
great that King Halo and I remain shaken for the
rest of the gathering.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, really?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Everything is about timing and seizing your
moment quickly. It's the same in racing, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...H-hey... Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you think so too? Ehe. Two strong
sprinters like us really do think alike, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Could you tell me a little more about what you
were talking about earlier? For future reference,
of course.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But of course! ♪ Let's talk a bunch until my
chocolate latte comes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just like that, the teacher and student switch roles. I guess seizing the moment really is what's important!
